title: Jajpur Heat Wave
lead: Jajpur is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.97. This anomaly has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Jajpur has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 19.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 45%, and the wind speed is 12.3 km/h, contributing to the heat wave's intensity. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) with a value of 0.0 GG further emphasizes the extreme heat conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
